description: Full end-to-end integration tests for bw CLI covering Chrome, Firefox output formats
steps: Test: bw_timeline_chrome_history_csv_has_header — create Chrome History SQLite in tempfile, run bw timeline --format csv, assert stdout first line contains 'timestamp,browser,artifact,source,description'
Test: bw_timeline_chrome_history_jsonl_valid_json — run bw timeline --format jsonl, assert each output line parses as valid serde_json::Value
Test: bw_cookies_nonexistent_path_exits_nonzero — run bw cookies /nonexistent/path, assert exit code != 0
Test: bw_timeline_firefox_history_text — create Firefox places.sqlite in tempfile, run bw timeline, assert stdout contains '[' (timestamp bracket)
Test: bw_history_chrome_text_output — same as timeline but using bw history subcommand
All existing help tests still pass
